code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of triples about a politician into a readable sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Get the main subject from the first triple
    subject = triples[0].subject

    # Create predicate to sentence fragment mapping
    predicate_map = {
        "birthPlace": lambda t: f"who was born in {t.object}",
        "birthDate": lambda t: f"born on {t.object}",
        "birthYear": lambda t: f"born in {t.object}",
        "deathPlace": lambda t: f"who died in {t.object}",
        "deathDate": lambda t: f"died on {t.object}",
        "deathYear": lambda t: f"died in {t.object}",
        "office": lambda t: f"who served as {t.object}",
        "party": lambda t: f"a member of the {t.object}",
        "nationality": lambda t: f"of {t.object}",
        "profession": lambda t: f"a {t.object}",
        "successor": lambda t: f"succeeded by {t.object}",
        "predecessor": lambda t: f"predecessed by {t.object}",
        "spouse": lambda t: f"married to {t.object}",
        "country": lambda t: f"from {t.object}",
        "state": lambda t: f"of {t.object}",
        "capital": lambda t: f"whose capital is {t.object}",
        "militaryBranch": lambda t: f"of the {t.object}",
        "militaryRank": lambda t: f"with the rank of {t.object}",
        "award": lambda t: f"awarded the {t.object}",
        "residence": lambda t: f"residing in {t.object}",
        "region": lambda t: f"in the region of {t.object}",
        "activeYearsStartDate": lambda t: f"active since {t.object}",
        "activeYearsEndDate": lambda t: f"active until {t.object}",
        "serviceStartYear": lambda t: f"began service in {t.object}",
        "inOfficeWhilePresident": lambda t: f"during the presidency of {t.object}",
        "inOfficeWhilePrimeMinister": lambda t: f"during the prime ministership of {t.object}",
        "inOfficeWhileVicePresident": lambda t: f"during the vice presidency of {t.object}",
        "inOfficeWhileGovernor": lambda t: f"during the governorship of {t.object}",
        "inOfficeWhileMonarch": lambda t: f"during the reign of {t.object}",
        "hasDeputy": lambda t: f"with deputy {t.object}",
        "unit": lambda t: f"of the {t.object}",
        "religion": lambda t: f"of the {t.object} faith",
        "language": lambda t: f"where {t.object} is spoken",
        "officialLanguage": lambda t: f"with {t.object} as official language",
        "currency": lambda t: f"using the {t.object}",
        "leader": lambda t: f"led by {t.object}",
        "largestCity": lambda t: f"whose largest city is {t.object}",
        "governingBody": lambda t: f"with {t.object} as governing body",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda t: f"home to {t.object}",
        "battle": lambda t: f"who fought in the {t.object}",
        "isPartOfMilitaryConflict": lambda t: f"part of the {t.object}",
        "commander": lambda t: f"commanded by {t.object}",
        "trainerAircraft": lambda t: f"using {t.object} as trainer aircraft",
        "colour": lambda t: f"whose colour is {t.object}",
        "place": lambda t: f"located in {t.object}",
        "numberOfVotesAttained": lambda t: f"with {t.object} votes",
        "affiliation": lambda t: f"affiliated with {t.object}",
        "garrison": lambda t: f"garrisoned at {t.object}",
    }

    # Build sentence fragments
    fragments = []
    main_info = []
    secondary_info = []

    for t in triples:
        if t.predicate in predicate_map:
            fragment = predicate_map[t.predicate](t)
            # Prioritize main subject info
            if t.predicate in ["office", "profession", "party", "nationality", "birthPlace"]:
                main_info.append(fragment)
            else:
                secondary_info.append(fragment)

    # Combine into one coherent sentence
    if not main_info:
        if not secondary_info:
            return subject
        sentence = f"{subject} {secondary_info[0]}"
        for frag in secondary_info[1:]:
            sentence += f", {frag}"
    else:
        sentence = f"{subject} {main_info[0]}"
        for frag in main_info[1:]:
            sentence += f", {frag}"
        for frag in secondary_info:
            sentence += f", {frag}"

    return sentence + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
